title: Object Unicorn Material Highly Colorful Glazed Ceramic
sourceTitle: Object Unicorn Material Highly Colorful Glazed Ceramic
prompt:
OBJECT=a unicorn
MATERIAL=highly colorful glazed ceramic CONNECTOR_INSTRUCTION=on BASE_MATERIAL=a highly polished marble base

Create an image of a [OBJECT], made entirely of different types of [MATERIAL], using the various natural colors of the [MATERIAL] to create the [OBJECT]'s beautiful patterns. Do not use any painted colors or other items to create the [OBJECT]. Place the finished [OBJECT][CONNECTOR_INSTRUCTION] a [BASE_MATERIAL] base, as a display piece. --ar 9:16 --chaos 25 --ar 9:16 --v 7
